plan.summary: Rebuild week after a very light prior 7 days (TSS 65 vs 227): athlete is fresh (TSB +11), HRV healthy, readiness solid — safely ramp volume and add one threshold session to push CTL from 29 toward 31, targeting ~210–230 TSS for the week.

workout.label: Strength + Mobility
workout.description: Full-body functional strength: 3x10 goblet squats, Romanian deadlifts, single-leg step-ups, push-ups, bent-over rows, plank variations. Finish with 10 min hip flexor and thoracic mobility. Keep HR low — this is structural work, not cardio.

nutrition.breakfast: Oat bowl: 80g rolled oats cooked with oat milk, 1 banana sliced, 1 tbsp almond butter, 1 tbsp chia seeds, pinch cinnamon
nutrition.lunch: Grain bowl: 150g cooked brown rice, 120g canned chickpeas (rinsed), roasted zucchini and bell pepper, 2 tbsp tahini-lemon dressing
nutrition.dinner: Black bean tacos: corn tortillas, sautéed black beans with cumin and garlic, shredded cabbage, salsa, sliced avocado, lime
nutrition.snacks: Apple + 20g almonds; 1 rice cake with peanut butter

workout.label: Easy Aerobic Run
workout.description: Z2 easy run, HR 130–145 bpm throughout. Run conversational pace on flat terrain. Focus on cadence ~170–175 spm and relaxed form. No surges. This begins rebuilding run aerobic base after the light week.

nutrition.breakfast: Oat bowl: 80g rolled oats, 1 banana, 1 tbsp almond butter, 1 tbsp chia seeds, handful blueberries
nutrition.lunch: Grain bowl: 150g cooked brown rice, 100g cooked green lentils, roasted sweet potato cubes, handful spinach, tahini dressing
nutrition.dinner: Baked cod fillet with lemon and herbs, 200g roasted baby potatoes, steamed green beans with olive oil
nutrition.snacks: Banana + 2 tbsp peanut butter pre-run; Greek yogurt with a drizzle of honey post-run

workout.label: Threshold Bike — Sweet Spot Intervals
workout.description: Warm up 15 min Z2. Main set: 3x12 min at sweet spot (88–93% FTP / Z3-Z4 border), 5 min easy spin between each. Cool down 10 min easy. This is the quality session of the week, timed while TSB is positive and HRV strong. Keep cadence 85–95 rpm.

nutrition.breakfast: 2 scrambled eggs + 2 egg whites on 2 slices whole grain toast, sliced tomato, black coffee
nutrition.lunch: Grain bowl: 150g cooked farro, 120g canned white beans, roasted broccoli and red onion, olive oil and apple cider vinegar dressing
nutrition.dinner: Tempeh stir-fry: 180g tempeh cubed and pan-fried, broccoli, snap peas, carrots, soy-ginger sauce, served over 180g cooked jasmine rice
nutrition.snacks: Banana + rice cake 30 min pre-ride; 500ml water with electrolytes during ride; chocolate oat milk recovery drink post-ride

workout.label: Aerobic Swim — Technique Focus
workout.description: 1600–1800m total. Warm up 200m easy. Drills: 4x50m catch-up drill, 4x50m fist drill. Main set: 6x100m at comfortable aerobic pace (Z2, RPE 5–6), 20 sec rest. Cool down 100m easy. Focus on high elbow catch and bilateral breathing.

nutrition.breakfast: Oat bowl: 80g oats, 1 banana, 1 tbsp almond butter, 1 tbsp flaxseed, oat milk
nutrition.lunch: Grain bowl: 150g brown rice, 100g canned chickpeas, roasted cauliflower and spinach, hummus dollop, lemon juice
nutrition.dinner: Red lentil dal: 180g dried red lentils, canned tomatoes, onion, garlic, cumin, coriander, turmeric, served with 2 whole wheat flatbreads and a side of wilted spinach
nutrition.snacks: Small handful trail mix (almonds, pumpkin seeds, dried cranberries); 1 rice cake with almond butter

workout.label: Easy Recovery Ride
workout.description: Pure Z1–Z2 spin, HR <135 bpm, power <65% FTP. Legs-only recovery — flush the fatigue from Wednesday's threshold session. Cadence 85+ rpm, flat or trainer. No efforts, no surges. Optional: do this outdoors for mental freshness.

nutrition.breakfast: 2 eggs scrambled with 1 cup sautéed spinach and mushrooms, 1 slice whole grain toast, black coffee
nutrition.lunch: Grain bowl: 150g cooked brown rice, 100g green lentils, cucumber, shredded carrot, tahini-lemon dressing
nutrition.dinner: Pasta e fagioli: whole wheat pasta, canned cannellini beans, canned tomatoes, garlic, rosemary, vegetable broth, parmesan shaving optional
nutrition.snacks: Apple + 20g walnuts; small bowl Greek yogurt

workout.label: Long Aerobic Ride
workout.description: Z2 endurance ride, HR 130–148 bpm, power 60–75% FTP. Keep it honest and steady — no drifting into Z3 except brief climbs. Aim for 2 full hours. Bring 2 bottles of electrolytes and 1–2 snacks on bike. This is the CTL-building cornerstone of the week.

nutrition.breakfast: Oat bowl: 100g oats, 1 banana, 1 tbsp almond butter, 1 tbsp chia seeds, blueberries, oat milk — eat 60–75 min before ride
nutrition.lunch: Post-ride recovery: large grain bowl with 180g cooked farro, 150g canned chickpeas, roasted sweet potato, avocado, olive oil dressing — eat within 45 min of finishing
nutrition.dinner: Baked salmon fillet with dill and lemon, 200g roasted potatoes, large mixed green salad with olive oil and vinegar
nutrition.snacks: 2 medjool dates + small banana on-bike during ride; rice cake with peanut butter mid-morning if hungry

workout.label: Long Easy Run
workout.description: Z2 long run, HR 130–145 bpm. Run easy and aerobic — if HR climbs above 148 on hills, walk briefly and let it settle. Focus on time on feet, not pace. This completes the weekend double-brick of long efforts to drive CTL. Hydrate well before and after.

nutrition.breakfast: 2 eggs + 1 egg white scrambled, 1 slice whole grain toast, 1 banana, black coffee — eat 45–60 min before run
nutrition.lunch: Grain bowl: 150g brown rice, 120g canned black beans, roasted corn, cherry tomatoes, lime-cumin dressing, small handful pumpkin seeds
nutrition.dinner: Sunday reset: tofu and vegetable curry — 200g firm tofu cubed, canned coconut milk, canned tomatoes, spinach, sweet potato, curry powder, served over 180g jasmine rice
nutrition.snacks: Greek yogurt with a drizzle of honey and sliced banana post-run; small handful almonds in the afternoon

Produce: corn on cob or frozen corn x1

conversation.content:
Plan the week of Jun 22 – Jun 28.

Current fitness data:
- CTL (fitness): 29.1
- ATL (fatigue): 18.1
- TSB (form): 11.0 (positive = fresh, negative = fatigued)
- TSS last 7 days: 65
- TSS prior 7 days: 227
- Last night HRV: 69 ms
- 7-day avg HRV: 86.0 ms
- 7-day avg resting HR: 49.3 bpm
- Oura readiness score: 83/100

Use this data to calibrate intensity and volume for the week.
